name: Impeccable Crafting

rules.text: Whenever you roll a success at a Crafting check to make an item of the type you chose with Specialty Crafting, you get a critical success instead.
rules.title: {item|name}

description: You craft flawless creations with great efficiency. Whenever you roll a success at a Crafting check to make an item of the type you chose with , you get a critical success instead.
